description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Bazel CI that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix job that runs on macos-latest, ubuntu-20.04, and windows-2019. For each OS, check out the source, and then perform OS-specific setup and installation of dependencies such as locales and telegraf. Finally, build and test the project using bazel, including a scraping test on non-Windows platforms and a benchmark.
